basics.name: Sana Mazahir
basics.label: NSERC Postdoctoral Fellow
basics.summary: NSERC Postdoctoral Fellow at York University working on integrated sensing and communication systems, MIMO radar waveform and beampattern design, statistical signal processing, mixed-field and distributed ISAC, and sensing-communication-control co-design.

work.name: York University
work.summary: Research on integrated sensing and communication modeling, performance analysis, and resource allocation.
highlights: Advisor: Professor Hina Tabassum.
Collaborators: Professor H. Vincent Poor, Princeton University, and Professor Adeel Akhtar, New Jersey Institute of Technology.

work.name: York University
work.summary: Research on orthogonal time frequency space based integrated sensing and communication.
highlights: Advisor: Professor Hina Tabassum.

work.name: National University of Sciences and Technology
work.summary: Research in approximate computing, including adaptive and heterogeneous approximate accelerators.
highlights: System Analysis and Verification Lab, Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science.
Advisor: Professor Osman Hasan.

work.name: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology
work.summary: Information-theoretic analysis of visible light communication systems.
highlights: Communication Theory Lab.
Advisors: Professor Mohamed-Slim Alouini and Professor Anas Chaaban.

work.name: National University of Sciences and Technology
work.summary: Probabilistic modeling and analysis of approximate adders and multipliers.
highlights: System Analysis and Verification Lab.
Advisor: Professor Osman Hasan.

work.name: AuditXPRT (now AI XPRT) Pvt. Ltd.
work.summary: Developed machine-learning-based table parsing and recognition algorithms for automated document auditing.

work.name: RWR Pvt. Ltd.
work.summary: Implemented embedded radar digital signal processing algorithms.
